title: Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowera Lyrics Raja Mandhiri Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowera Song Lyrics
Singer(s):A.C.S. Ravichandran
Lyrics: Justin Prabhakaran

Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowere
enna kadhalikka porandha
en lover-u

kilakkae pogum
en rayilae.
padhinaaru vayadhinil
aaguraney
amul tinnu
paal bannu
tea kadayaa manasa
aathuriyae.

Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowere
enna kadhalikka porandha
en lover-u

goli soda neethaan
openeru naanthaan.
enna yaeppam poduthey
kadhalu.

kaali bottle naanthaan
cooling water neethaan
rendum kalandhaa
adangum en thaagamey.

jallikattu pola enna
thalli vittu poravalaey
vaadi,
unna katti adakkuven
naaney.
oru maanu konjam
valanji kodukkalaamey

goods vandi neethaan
thandavaalam naanthaan
nenjil thadaku thadakkunu
aadura.

operator naanthaan
toorin talkies neethaan
mohan paattapottu
mugam kaattuva.

naal kurichi natchadhiram
paakka sollu ungappanathaan.
aaaththaa kovilula
thaali katta readyaa
neeyum readyaa

Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowere
enna kadhalikka porandha
en lover-u

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowera expresses the joy and excitement of love, portraying the feelings of a lover who is enamored with their partner.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

The song is featured in Raja Mandhiri, highlighting a romantic moment between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by A.C.S Ravichandran and composed by Justin Prabhakaran, who also penned the lyrics.

When was the song released?

Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowera was released on April 7, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowera, the protagonist expresses deep affection for their lover, creating a warm and romantic atmosphere. The song's lyrics beautifully convey the excitement and joy of love, making it a perfect fit for weddings and celebrations. With its melodious tune and heartfelt delivery by A.C.S Ravichandran, it evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia. This enchanting track from Raja Mandhiri is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the bliss of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ethitha Veetu Kaliflowera from Raja Mandhiri is a delightful romantic melody that captures the essence of love and affection. With A.C.S Ravichandran's soulful voice and Justin Prabhakaran's enchanting composition, this song creates a vibrant atmosphere perfect for celebrating love. Dive into the lyrical beauty and let the music sweep you off your feet!
stanzaMeanings: My lover who was born to love me, is like a flower from this house.
Every day I see you, I want to sing about you.
In my dreams, I go to you. At the age of sixteen, I feel like a child, longing for milk and tea.
My lover who was born to love me, is like a flower from this house.
Every day I see you, I want to sing about you.
You are the opener of the soda bottle, and I am the one who pours it. Why do you keep giving me love?
I am the black bottle, and you are the cooling water. When we mix, my heart feels complete.
Like a jallikattu bull, I will throw you away, but I will tie you up. Can I give a little bit of my heart?
You are the goods vehicle, and I am the one who dances in my heart, feeling the beat.
I am the operator, and you are the one who shows the movie, revealing your face with a beautiful song.
Tell me about the star of the day, it is your father. Are you ready to tie the knot in the temple?
Come to me step by step, okay?
My lover who was born to love me, is like a flower from this house.
Every day I see you, I want to sing about you.
In my dreams, I go to you. At the age of sixteen, I feel like a child.
